## Task Description
What does this PR do? Link to the relevant plan in `docs/plans/`.

## Agent Context
- **Agent Model:** <model used>
- **Plan File:** `docs/plans/<filename>.md`
- **Branch:** `agent/<id>-<description>`

## Changes
- [ ] List of files changed and why

## Testing
- [ ] How were the changes tested?
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run pyright` passes

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional commit messages with Agent-Task/Agent-Model trailers
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
